calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John R. Braun, in court, for and with John W. Elliot, Executor.

The court points counsel to whether the disclaimers of interest in the decedent's intangible property included the $50k gift to Fred Dreher provided in the will. Counsel reports that it was exclusively a scrivener's error on his behalf and never intended to include a disclaimer for the $50k gift to Fred Dreher which is why he filed an amended disclaimer. The court advises counsel that it is in a difficult position as disclaimers are irrevocable. Counsel submits to the court legal research from CEB (Continuing Education of the Bar) in advocacy for the instant petition.

The court takes a moment to review the legal research and takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Maloney. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-13-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 17, 2012 is admitted to probate. John W. Elliot is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 13, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
